_about: The DURABLE source of truth for this playlist, read by the skill scripts (run from this research/ dir). Committed alongside picks.json / overrides.json / curator.json / article.md. Everything else in this dir (verified.json, enriched.json, *_cache.json, ../playlist_items.json) is a regenerated build artifact and is gitignored — Discogs and YouTube are the live source of truth, fetched just-in-time.

playlist.title: The Jersey Sound — FIDA/ThinkSoul Top 100 (30 Years Later)
playlist.description: The community's own canon: the FIDA/ThinkSoul Committee 'Jersey Sound Top 100' (Christopher Flowers, 2019), Discogs-verified (master releases always linked) and rebuilt with the discogs-playlist skill. Newark/Essex County soulful-gospel vocal house, Club Zanzibar / Tony Humphries era. Ranked list, played in chronological order; blank slots 58 & 59 filled by the curator (Blaze - Whatcha Gonna Do; Kerri Chandler - Hallelujah). Source: https://flowerzindattic.blogspot.com/2019/12/the-jersey-sound-top-100-30-years-later.html
